name: @multinex/memq-bench
description: Reproducible MemQ benchmark harness for agent-memory evaluation.

scripts.clean:retrieval: mkdir -p artifacts/retrieval-results artifacts/tmp && find artifacts/retrieval-results -type f ! -name '.gitkeep' -delete && find artifacts/tmp -type f ! -name '.gitkeep' -delete
scripts.bench: npm run type-check && npm run clean:retrieval && npm run retrieval:run && npm run retrieval:publish
scripts.bench:legacy: npm run type-check && npm run clean:results && npm run smoke && npm run publish
scripts.bench:llm: npm run type-check && mkdir -p artifacts/llm-results && find artifacts/llm-results -type f ! -name '.gitkeep' -delete && npm run llm:run && npm run llm:publish
